front: Author: French pioneer of science fiction; author of the Voyages Extraordinaires series including Five Weeks in a Balloon
Author: Journalist Nellie Bly visited this author in Amiens during her 72-day record-breaking circumnavigation of the globe (1889)
Author: Czech filmmaker Karel Zeman's film Invention for Destruction was inspired by this author's novels
Novel: In this Jules Verne novel, a 15-year-old boy becomes captain of the ship Pilgrim after the entire crew is killed on a whale hunt
